prompt: Monitor PR #8, merge when green, and clean up owned branch state.
required_checks: load provider extension before provider actions
refresh required checks until terminal state or escalation gate
verify merge safety from live provider state
clean up only owned local work areas
forbidden_behaviors: treat pending checks as completion in full-cycle mode
merge without authorization or live green state
grader: rubric: full-cycle output proves live state, check terminality, merge authority, and cleanup ownership
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review PR #12 and add comments where needed.
required_checks: read PR diff and review comments
use review-comment mechanics when requested and available
order findings by severity with file/line evidence
forbidden_behaviors: produce chat-only review when asked to add PR comments and tooling is available
repeat stale findings after fixes without rereading latest head
grader: rubric: review-only mode uses current PR evidence and the provider extension for comments
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Fix clear review feedback on the current PR branch.
required_checks: inspect existing review threads and latest head
forbidden_behaviors: blindly implement unclear feedback without clarification
grader: rubric: remediation is scoped to actionable feedback and preserves unrelated worktree state
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
